title: alocasia subrotunda
intro: Alocasia subrotunda, also known as the 'Round Leaf Elephant Ear', is a species of flowering plant in the family Arum, native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Alocasia subrotunda include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
